title: Evangelion Girfriend of Steel Questions
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion Girfriend of Steel Questions             Quote Post by oshan » Mon Feb 14, 2011 6:49 pm Hi, I'm playing the PC version for GF of Steel and could anyone tell me how to save progress? Or maybe my question might be how to bring up the options menu in game. Thank you so much!

[]:             Quote Post by Clover » Mon Feb 14, 2011 7:49 pm Did you read the manual?

[]:             Quote Post by oshan » Tue Feb 15, 2011 3:22 pm I don't have a manual to read. I have the english fansubbed version.

[]:             Quote Post by rhfxz1s » Tue Feb 15, 2011 8:15 pm Not only could I not figure out how to save in this game, but I don't think it's possible to even pause it during a scene where people are talking. The UI is horrendous. I still played it and liked it though. Damn fanboyism.

[]:             Quote Post by oshan » Tue Feb 15, 2011 8:51 pm Reason I ask about if saving is possible, is upon starting this is available in options: [URL=http://img146.imageshack.us/i/10209008.jpg/] [/URL] Uploaded with [URL=http://imageshack.us]ImageShack.us[/URL] It might just be starting preferences, but I have doubt. EDIT>>>>>>>>>>>>>> Now this is weird, I was initially playing on a XP box. Tonight I loaded it onto a Win7 box and look what magically appeared: (Lower Left Corner, Click link!) [URL=http://img689.imageshack.us/i/63742743.jpg/][IMG=http://img689.imageshack.us/img689/7922/63742743.th.jpg][/IMG][/URL] Uploaded with [URL=http://imageshack.us]ImageShack.us[/URL] So I guess it's a OS issue or resolution/refresh rate issue. Needless to say the system option was not there before

[]:             Quote Post by Crazy Packers Fan » Wed Feb 16, 2011 4:38 am I remember a certain point in the game where you could no longer save, because it was all cinematics, and thus I had to sit through the same cinematics three times to see the three endings to the game. (I like the Kaji ending the best.)

[]:             Quote Post by shito » Wed Feb 16, 2011 8:16 pm Simply click on "System", then on "Record" in any of the 4 files, then the next time you boot up the game simply click on "Load" and it will take you to your last save. I just tried it on my (Japanese) copy and it works 100%

[]:             Quote Post by Clover » Mon Feb 14, 2011 7:49 pm Did you read the manual?
